phaseGoal: Dashboard executivo + narrativa core (objectives/highlights/decisions) + Recursos + suppress válvula

userStories.title: Migration: ProjectWikiSection audit columns
userStories.description: Cria migration adicionando colunas generatedAt, generatedBy, schemaVersion, suppressed em ProjectWikiSection, revoga INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE de authenticated.
acceptanceCriteria: Arquivo supabase/migrations/20260530c_project_wiki_section_audit_cols.sql existe com DDL do PRD §7.1
authenticated não tem privilégio INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE na tabela

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='ProjectWikiSection' AND column_name IN ('generatedAt','generatedBy','schemaVersion','suppressed');

userStories.title: Migration: ProjectResource table
userStories.description: Cria tabela ProjectResource com RLS via can_view_project / can_edit_project.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration roda via psql sem erro
RLS habilitado, policies pr_select e pr_modify existem

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT polname FROM pg_policy WHERE polrelid = '"ProjectResource"'::regclass ORDER BY polname;

userStories.title: Migration: ProjectWikiSectionSource table
userStories.description: Cria tabela ProjectWikiSectionSource (FK pra ProjectWikiSection ON DELETE CASCADE) com RLS de SELECT via JOIN.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration roda via psql sem erro
RLS habilitado, INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE revogados de authenticated

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT indexname FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename = 'ProjectWikiSectionSource' ORDER BY indexname;

userStories.title: Regenerate database.types.ts
userStories.description: Regerar tipos TypeScript do Supabase pós-migrations.
acceptanceCriteria: Tipo ProjectWikiSection inclui as 4 colunas novas

verifiable.command_or_query: npx supabase gen types typescript --linked > src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts (ou comando equivalente do projeto)

userStories.title: Zod schemas para output narrativo da Wiki
userStories.description: Cria src/lib/wiki/schemas.ts com Zod schemas pra objectives, highlights, decisions. Cada bullet tem bulletHash e source {type,id}.
acceptanceCriteria: Arquivo src/lib/wiki/schemas.ts exporta ObjectivesSchema, HighlightsSchema, DecisionsSchema
Cada schema valida max items (objectives 1, highlights 5, decisions 10)

userStories.title: Helper bulletHash + suppressed type
userStories.description: Cria src/lib/wiki/suppressed.ts com computeBulletHash(text, sourceId) (sha256 hex[:8]), tipo SuppressedEntry, isSuppressed(bullet, suppressed[]).

userStories.title: DAL: getWikiMetrics(projectId)
userStories.description: Cria src/lib/dal/wiki-metrics.ts retornando {hero, metrics, team, roadmap} via queries SQL agregadas. Cache em-memória 5min.
acceptanceCriteria: Shape inclui hero.sprintNumber, hero.completionPercent, hero.fpDone, hero.fpTotal, hero.nextMilestoneDays
Query usa só tabelas existentes (Sprint, Task, FunctionPoint, ProjectAccess, Member, DesignSession)

userStories.title: API route GET /api/projects/[id]/wiki/metrics
userStories.description: Route handler retorna WikiMetrics via getWikiMetrics. Auth canViewProject. Zod do [id].
acceptanceCriteria: 401 sem auth, 403 sem canViewProject, 200 com shape WikiMetrics

userStories.title: Edge Function skeleton: run-wiki-composer
userStories.description: Cria supabase/functions/run-wiki-composer/index.ts baseado no padrão export-design-session. Aceita {projectId, jobId}, retorna {status, error?}.
acceptanceCriteria: Arquivo existe, roda via supabase functions serve sem crash

verifiable.command_or_query: supabase functions serve run-wiki-composer & curl -X POST http://localhost:54321/functions/v1/run-wiki-composer -H 'Authorization: Bearer <service_role>' -d '{"projectId":"<uuid>","jobId":"<uuid>"}'

userStories.title: Edge Function: load context (DS + meetings + tasks)
userStories.description: Implementa loadWikiContext(projectId): DS Inception approved mais recente, meetings 14d (type != private), tasks completed na janela. Trunca transcript a 3000 chars.
acceptanceCriteria: Retorna {inceptionDS, meetings, completedTasks}; inceptionDS:null se sem DS

verifiable.command_or_query: Invocar Edge function com projectId real (seed); inspecionar logs

userStories.title: Edge Function: LLM calls per section
userStories.description: 3 funções composeObjectives, composeHighlights, composeDecisions; OpenRouter call + Zod validate + response_format json_object. Mock via env WIKI_DRY_RUN=1.
acceptanceCriteria: 3 funções definidas no arquivo da Edge
Parse fail → retorna {error: string} sem throw

verifiable.command_or_query: WIKI_DRY_RUN=1 supabase functions serve run-wiki-composer & curl ...

userStories.title: Edge Function: persist (UPSERT + sources + preserve suppressed)
userStories.description: Transação: SELECT suppressed atual, DELETE Source rows antigas, UPSERT ProjectWikiSection (preserving suppressed), INSERT new Source rows, AgentUsage log.
acceptanceCriteria: Sources antigas deletadas antes das novas

verifiable.command_or_query: Após invocar compose, SELECT suppressed FROM "ProjectWikiSection" WHERE "projectId"=<id> AND key='objectives'; (em test fixture com suppressed pré-populado)
SELECT count(*) FROM "AgentUsage" WHERE "agentName" LIKE 'wiki-composer-%' AND "createdAt" > now() - interval '1 minute';

userStories.title: API route POST /api/projects/[id]/wiki/compose (async 202)
userStories.description: Gera jobId (uuid), invoca Edge Function via fetch interno (não-bloqueante), retorna 202 + {jobId}. Auth canEditProject. Job store em-memória v1.
acceptanceCriteria: Edge Function invocada em background (Promise não-awaited)

userStories.title: API route GET /api/projects/[id]/wiki/jobs/[jobId]
userStories.description: Retorna status do job (pending|running|done|failed) consultando job-store. Auth canViewProject.

userStories.title: API route POST/DELETE /api/projects/[id]/wiki/suppress
userStories.description: POST adiciona {bulletHash, suppressedBy, suppressedAt} no array suppressed; DELETE remove. Auth canEditProject; service role pra escrever.

verifiable.command_or_query: Após 2x POST com mesmo bulletHash: SELECT jsonb_array_length(suppressed) FROM "ProjectWikiSection" WHERE ...;

userStories.title: Component WikiHero (read-only métricas)
userStories.description: Componente que renderiza linha Hero com sprint/completion/FP/próximo marco. Esconde FP de guest via useCanSeeFunctionPoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Renderiza 'Sprint N · X% · Y/Z FP · marco em Wd'

userStories.title: Component WikiNarrativeSection com suppress menu
userStories.description: Lista de bullets com ↳ fonte clicável + menu ⋯ com 'Ocultar bullet' (chama suppress API via useOptimisticCollection).
acceptanceCriteria: Recebe section: { key, data: { bullets }, suppressed }
DropdownMenu com 'Ocultar bullet' chama POST /wiki/suppress via useOptimisticCollection.mutate

userStories.title: Refatorar project-wiki.tsx (novo layout)
userStories.description: Reescreve src/components/project-wiki.tsx: WikiHero + 3 WikiNarrativeSection (objectives/highlights/decisions) + Team + footer com botão Gerar Wiki + timestamp. Sem Tiptap.
acceptanceCriteria: project-wiki.tsx renderiza Hero + objectives + highlights + decisions + team + footer
Botão 'Gerar Wiki' chama POST /wiki/compose, polling GET /jobs/[jobId] 1s até done|failed
Renderiza num projeto seed sem erro

userStories.title: Tab Recursos: CRUD ProjectResource
userStories.description: Tab Recursos em /projects/[id] com lista agrupada por kind + ResponsiveSheet de create/edit usando Field + useOptimisticCollection.
acceptanceCriteria: Botão '+ Recurso' abre ResponsiveSheet com Field pra title/url/notes/kind
API routes /api/projects/[id]/resources e /[resourceId] implementadas com canEditProject

userStories.title: Script: migrar conteúdo manual legado para ProjectResource
userStories.description: Script scripts/migrate-wiki-to-resources.ts com --dry-run. Lê ProjectWikiSection antigos com keys links/sponsors/environments, cria ProjectResource, backup em ProjectWikiSection_legacy.
acceptanceCriteria: Script roda com pnpm tsx scripts/migrate-wiki-to-resources.ts --dry-run sem efeito
Sem flag, cria rows em ProjectResource + tabela ProjectWikiSection_legacy populada
Idempotente (rodar 2x não duplica, checa por url+title+projectId)

verifiable.expected: log com counts, 0 rows em DB

verifiable.command_or_query: Rodar script 2× sem --dry-run, SELECT count(*) FROM "ProjectResource";
